title: TFC : Carry on Storage
body:
### TFC : Carry on Storage
This is a simple mod currently adding 2 Carry on Storage options being the Knapsack and Backpack for Terrafirmacraft.
This mod was orignally a small project for mine and a few friends terrafirmacraft server but I decided to Improve the textures and add The Backpack to then release it as a mod.

### In the Second Update:
- Items having correct weight values
- Ability to place Knapsacks and Backpacks on Tool Racks
- New Knapsack and Backpack GUI

### To do:
- Add Curios Support
- Knapsacks can't be placed in Backpacks and Vise Versa
- Update mod page
